text:
PTC_PBP_ID_09 
PTC_PBP_ID_10 
PTC_PBP_ID_11 
PTC_PBP_ID_12 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: Three-digit alphanumeric that can include leading zeros 
Null/missing = Not Enrolled in Medicare Part C (or enrolled in 1833 cost plans, which means the 
PBP_ID is n/a) 

COMMENT: If the beneficiary was not enrolled in a managed care plan for a given month, this variable will be 
null/missing for that month; this includes beneficiaries not enrolled in
